summary: StudyNeeds - A comprehensive multi-service platform for students combining e-commerce (books, stationery, furniture), home tuition marketplace, documentation services, and career counseling. Building in phases starting with core e-commerce store.
architectural_notes: Online payments + Cash on Delivery support
Teacher rating and AI recommendation placeholders
SEO-friendly with fast loading and modern animations
known_issues: Admin panel product add functionality not working - products not saving to backend and not displaying in list after form submission
Demo products not displaying in Products tab - backend product query may be failing
Console showing 8 issues that may be related to backend-frontend API connection problems

existing_features.title: Create a homepage that serves as the default e-commerce store with a header containing StudyNeeds logo (left), search bar (center), location selector, Login/Register buttons, cart icon, and menu categories dropdown

Implement a promotional banner slider on the homepage showing 5 banners: Back to School Sale, Competitive Exam Books, Study Furniture Deals, Tuition Services Promotion, and Documentation Services Promotion
Create a categories section with icons for: Books, Stationery, School Bags, School Dress, Geometry Items, Study Tables & Furniture, Notes & PDFs, and Digital Courses

Display product sections on homepage: Trending Products, School Essentials, Competitive Exam Books, Budget Deals Under ₹199, Combo Offers, and Study Furniture. Each product card must show product image, title, price, discount percentage, rating, Add to Cart button, and Buy Now button

Create a services section with 4 cards: E-Commerce Store, Home Tuition Consultancy, Documentation Services, and Career Counselling (marked as Coming Soon). Each card includes an icon, short description, and action button
Add a 'Why Choose StudyNeeds' section highlighting: Trusted Platform, Affordable Pricing, Local Support, Verified Teachers, and Fast Delivery
Implement a testimonials section displaying student and parent reviews
Create a footer with sections for: About, Contact, Policies, Careers, Seller Registration, Social Media links, Address, and Newsletter Signup form
Create a Shop/Categories page showing filterable product listings by category
Build a Product Details page showing full product information, image gallery, price, discount, rating, reviews, quantity selector, Add to Cart, and Buy Now buttons
Implement shopping cart functionality with item list, quantity adjustment, price calculation, and proceed to checkout button
Create a checkout page with order summary, delivery address form, payment method selection (online payment and cash on delivery), and place order button
Use blue (#2563eb) and orange (#f97316) as primary color theme with white background throughout the application
Apply Poppins or Roboto font family throughout the application for all text elements
Ensure entire application is fully mobile-responsive with optimized layouts for mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports
Add a floating WhatsApp chat button visible on all pages for customer support
Deploy the complete StudyNeeds application (frontend and backend) to the Internet Computer network for production access
Replace the existing logo in the Header component with the uploaded StudyNeeds logo image (logo_908978-removebg-preview.png) maintaining the same layout and positioning in the header's left section

Create an Admin Dashboard page accessible from the frontend with sections for Products Management, Orders Management, and Users Management. The dashboard must display summary statistics including total products, total orders, pending orders, and total registered users.

Implement admin Products Management interface allowing admins to view all products in a table/grid, add new products with form inputs for name, category, description, price, discount, rating, stock, and image, edit existing products, delete products, and filter/search products by category or name.

Implement admin Orders Management interface displaying all customer orders in a table with columns for order ID, customer name, order date, total amount, payment method, order status, and actions. Admins must be able to view order details, update order status (Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled), and filter orders by status or date range.

Implement admin Users Management interface displaying all registered users with their profile information including name, email, phone, registration date, and order count. Admins must be able to view user details, see user order history, and filter users by registration date or search by name/email.

Protect the Admin Dashboard frontend routes with authentication and authorization checks. Only users with Admin role should be able to access the /admin routes. Display an unauthorized access message and redirect non-admin users attempting to access admin pages.

Display the newly created demo products in the homepage product sections: populate Trending Products section with a mix of high-rated products from all categories, populate School Essentials section with products from Stationery and School Bags categories, populate Budget Deals section with products that have prices under ₹199, and populate Furniture section with products from Study Furniture category

Add a Wishlist icon button to each ProductCard component that allows users to toggle wishlist status for that product with visual feedback (filled heart when wishlisted, outline heart when not wishlisted)
Ensure ProductCard component prominently displays a discount badge showing the discount percentage when a product has a discount greater than 0%
Verify AdminRoute protection component is correctly wrapping the admin dashboard route and properly checking authentication and admin authorization before allowing access
Add a visible navigation link or button in the Header component that allows authenticated admin users to easily access the admin panel at /admin without manually typing the URL

Test the complete admin panel workflow end-to-end including accessing /admin, viewing products/orders/users tabs, adding a new product, editing an existing product, and updating an order status to ensure all functionality works correctly

Investigate and fix the routing issue preventing the admin panel from displaying when users navigate to /admin - verify that the route definition in App.tsx correctly maps to AdminDashboardPage, ensure AdminRoute protection component is properly wrapping the route, and confirm that authenticated admin users can successfully load the admin dashboard interface

Check that the AdminRoute protection component is correctly checking authentication status and admin role before allowing access, and verify it properly renders the AdminDashboardPage when authorization succeeds

Diagnose and fix the TanStack Router configuration issue causing the 'search does not match any page' error when navigating to /admin. Verify that the admin route is properly registered in the router configuration and that path matching works correctly for the /admin path.

Test the complete admin panel access flow end-to-end: log in as an admin user, navigate to /admin via the header link, verify the page loads without routing errors, and confirm all admin dashboard sections (Products, Orders, Users) are accessible.

Fix the TanStack Router configuration in frontend/src/App.tsx to ensure the /admin route properly matches when users navigate to the URL https://studyneeds-c05.caffeine.xyz/#caffeineAdminToken=ce5861fcab1733db191f53acf1238a5fd5d097aabfd6c254c5de695de99ec00c/admin - the route must handle the hash-based routing with the caffeineAdminToken query parameter and correctly load the AdminDashboardPage without showing 'your search did not match any documents' error

Fix the TanStack Router configuration in frontend/src/App.tsx to properly handle the /admin route with hash-based routing containing caffeineAdminToken query parameter - ensure the route matches correctly when navigating to URLs like https://studyneeds-c05.caffeine.xyz/#caffeineAdminToken=ce5861fcab1733db191f53acf1238a5fd5d097aabfd6c254c5de695de99ec00c/admin without showing 'search did not match any documents' error

Ensure the Admin Panel navigation link in the Header component is consistently visible and functional for authenticated admin users in both draft and production deployments - the link must appear in the header navigation and be clickable

Verify the AdminRoute protection component does not interfere with TanStack Router path matching while still enforcing authentication and authorization checks - ensure it renders AdminDashboardPage when authorization succeeds

Remove all authentication and authorization checks from the Admin Panel navigation link in the Header component (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx) so the Admin Panel link is always visible to all users regardless of authentication status

Remove all authentication and authorization checks from the Admin Panel navigation link in the MobileMenu component (frontend/src/components/MobileMenu.tsx) so the Admin Panel link is always visible in the mobile menu to all users regardless of authentication status

Simplify the TanStack Router configuration in frontend/src/App.tsx to ensure the /admin route matches correctly for hash-based routing with caffeineAdminToken query parameter - verify the route definition uses proper path matching without complex search validation
Remove the AdminRoute protection component wrapper from the /admin route definition in frontend/src/App.tsx - render AdminDashboardPage directly without any authentication or authorization checks
Simplify the /admin route configuration in frontend/src/App.tsx to use basic path matching without search validation - remove all validateSearch, search schema, and complex routing parameters

Fix the frontend useGetAllProducts React Query hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to properly fetch and display products in the admin Products Management table - ensure error handling displays meaningful messages and loading states work correctly

Fix the frontend useCreateProduct mutation hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to properly submit new product data to the backend and handle the response - ensure the mutation invalidates the products query cache to trigger automatic list refresh after successful creation

Verify and fix the ProductFormModal component in frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFormModal.tsx to ensure form submission properly calls the useCreateProduct mutation with all required fields and handles loading/error states correctly

Add comprehensive error logging to both backend createProduct function and frontend useCreateProduct mutation to capture and display exact error messages when product creation fails - log validation errors, storage errors, and network errors with detailed context

Test the complete product management workflow end-to-end after fixes: navigate to admin Products tab, verify demo products display in the table, fill out Add Product form with test data, submit the form, verify 'Saving...' indicator appears briefly, confirm new product appears in the products table immediately after submission, and verify the product persists after page refresh

new_feature_requests.summary: Core e-commerce homepage with product listings, search, cart, and categories
Shop/Categories and Product Details pages
Shopping cart and checkout functionality
Home Tuition Consultancy page with teacher/student forms and listings
Documentation Services page with service categories and request form
Career Counselling coming soon page
User Dashboard (student view with orders, requests, profile)
Teacher Dashboard (leads, profile, earnings, reviews)
Store and manage product catalog in backend including product name, category, price, discount, rating, images, and stock quantity
Implement backend order management system storing customer orders with items, quantities, delivery address, payment method, order status, and timestamps
Add demo product data across categories: Stationery, Books, School Bags, Pens & Geometry

Populate the backend with comprehensive demo product data across multiple categories: Stationery (notebooks, pens, pencils, erasers, sharpeners, rulers, staplers, glue sticks), Books (textbooks for classes 1-12, competitive exam books for JEE/NEET/UPSC, reference books, story books), School Bags (backpacks, trolley bags, lunch bags, pencil cases), and Pens & Geometry (gel pens, ballpoint pens, fountain pens, compass sets, protractors, geometry boxes, dividers). Each product must include name, category, description, price, discount percentage, rating (1-5 stars), stock quantity, and at least one product image reference.

Add backend functions to support admin operations including getAllOrders to fetch all orders with customer details, updateOrderStatus to change order status by order ID, getAllUsers to retrieve all registered user profiles with order counts, deleteProduct to remove a product by ID, and updateProduct to modify existing product details.

Implement role-based access control in the backend by adding an Admin role to the AccessControl system. Restrict all admin management functions (getAllOrders, updateOrderStatus, getAllUsers, deleteProduct, updateProduct) to users with Admin role only. Create a mechanism to assign Admin role to specific Internet Identity principals.

Create at least 8 demo Stationery products in the backend with complete details including product name, category (Stationery), price, discount percentage, final calculated price, detailed description, 3-5 high-quality royalty-free product image URLs, demo rating (1-5 stars), stock quantity, and unique SKU code for each product

Create at least 8 demo Books products in the backend with complete details including product name, category (Books), price, discount percentage, final calculated price, detailed description, 3-5 high-quality royalty-free product image URLs, demo rating (1-5 stars), stock quantity, and unique SKU code for each product

Create at least 6 demo School Bags products in the backend with complete details including product name, category (School Bags), price, discount percentage, final calculated price, detailed description, 3-5 high-quality royalty-free product image URLs, demo rating (1-5 stars), stock quantity, and unique SKU code for each product

Create at least 6 demo Pens & Geometry products in the backend with complete details including product name, category (Pens & Geometry), price, discount percentage, final calculated price, detailed description, 3-5 high-quality royalty-free product image URLs, demo rating (1-5 stars), stock quantity, and unique SKU code for each product

Create at least 6 demo Study Furniture products in the backend with complete details including product name, category (Study Furniture), price, discount percentage, final calculated price, detailed description, 3-5 high-quality royalty-free product image URLs, demo rating (1-5 stars), stock quantity, and unique SKU code for each product
Debug and fix the /admin route so that it properly loads the AdminDashboardPage component when users navigate to /admin or the full URL with /admin path

Verify that the TanStack Router configuration in App.tsx includes the /admin route with proper lazy loading or direct component import, and ensure there are no conflicting route patterns that might prevent the admin route from matching

Test the complete navigation flow from clicking the Admin Panel link in the Header component through to successfully viewing the admin dashboard, ensuring the link correctly navigates to /admin and the page loads without errors
Verify that the AdminRoute protection wrapper is not interfering with route matching and that it properly renders the AdminDashboardPage when authentication and authorization succeed.

Ensure the Admin Panel navigation link in the Header component (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx) is visible for authenticated admin users in both draft and production deployments - the link should appear in the header navigation area and be clickable

Verify the AdminRoute protection component (frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx) correctly handles authentication and authorization checks while allowing the route to match properly - ensure it does not interfere with TanStack Router's path matching logic

Test the complete admin panel access flow end-to-end: authenticate as an admin user using the caffeineAdminToken, navigate to /admin via direct URL and via the header link, verify the AdminDashboardPage loads successfully with all tabs (Products, Orders, Users) accessible, and confirm no routing errors occur

Test the complete end-to-end admin panel access flow: authenticate as admin user using caffeineAdminToken, navigate to /admin via both direct URL and header link, verify AdminDashboardPage loads with all tabs (Products, Orders, Users) accessible, and confirm zero routing errors occur

Add a visible Admin Panel navigation link in the Header component (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx) that displays only for authenticated admin users. The link must be prominently placed in the desktop header navigation area, styled consistently with other header elements, and navigate to /admin when clicked.

Add an Admin Panel navigation link in the MobileMenu component (frontend/src/components/MobileMenu.tsx) that displays only for authenticated admin users. The link must be visible in the mobile slide-out menu, styled consistently with other menu items, and navigate to /admin when clicked.

Verify that the useIsCallerAdmin hook correctly identifies admin users based on authentication state and admin role assignment. Ensure the hook returns accurate boolean values for admin status checking across all components.

Test the complete admin panel access workflow end-to-end: authenticate as an admin user, verify the Admin Panel link appears in both desktop header and mobile menu, click the link to navigate to /admin, confirm the AdminDashboardPage loads successfully with all tabs (Products, Orders, Users) accessible, and verify zero routing errors occur throughout the flow.

Verify the AdminRoute protection component (frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx) properly renders the AdminDashboardPage without interfering with TanStack Router path matching - ensure the component wraps the dashboard page correctly while still performing necessary authorization checks
Verify the Admin Panel link in Header component (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx) remains permanently visible to all users without any conditional rendering based on authentication or admin status

Verify the Admin Panel link in MobileMenu component (frontend/src/components/MobileMenu.tsx) remains permanently visible to all users without any conditional rendering based on authentication or admin status

Test the complete admin panel access flow end-to-end: navigate to /admin via direct URL and via header/mobile menu links, verify AdminDashboardPage loads successfully with all tabs (Products, Orders, Users) accessible without any routing errors or authorization blocks

Debug and fix the backend product creation API in backend/main.mo to ensure new products are successfully saved when submitted through the admin panel Add Product form - verify the createProduct function properly stores products in the Map storage and returns success confirmation

Debug and fix the backend getAllProducts query function in backend/main.mo to ensure it returns all stored products including demo products - verify the function correctly retrieves products from Map storage and formats them for frontend consumption
